name: Code Block
summary: A polished code display component with syntax highlighting, line numbers, copy functionality, and optional animations for presenting code snippets, tutorials, and documentation examples beautifully.
detailedDescription: The Code Block component transforms plain code snippets into beautifully formatted, syntax-highlighted presentations suitable for documentation, tutorials, blogs, and developer-focused content. Built on react-syntax-highlighter, this component supports numerous programming languages with accurate syntax highlighting that makes code scannable and readable. Features include optional line numbers for easy reference, a copy-to-clipboard button for user convenience, language labels identifying the code type, and customizable themes matching light or dark mode interfaces. The component can include subtle animations like fade-in reveals or typing effects for engaging presentations. Code blocks support horizontal scrolling for long lines while maintaining layout integrity. Styling options include rounded corners, shadows, borders, and background treatments that elevate code from functional to visually appealing. Perfect for technical documentation, developer blogs, educational content, API references, or any context where presenting code clearly and attractively enhances comprehension and engagement. The component respects accessibility with proper semantic markup and keyboard-navigable copy buttons.
purpose: Present code snippets with accurate syntax highlighting for readability
Enhance technical documentation and tutorials with polished code displays
Provide copy-to-clipboard functionality for user convenience
Support multiple programming languages with appropriate highlighting
Make code visually appealing while maintaining clarity and accuracy
behavior: Applies syntax highlighting based on detected or specified language
Displays optional line numbers for code reference and discussion
Provides copy-to-clipboard button with visual feedback on success
Shows language label identifying code type for context
Enables horizontal scrolling for lines exceeding container width
Supports optional reveal or typing animations for engagement
Maintains proper code formatting and indentation
visualCharacteristics: Clean, readable syntax highlighting with customizable color themes
Professional code presentation suitable for documentation
Optional line numbers and language labels for clarity
Polished styling with borders, shadows, and backgrounds
Light and dark mode support for interface consistency
Accessible design with proper contrast and keyboard navigation
recommendations: Use where moderate motion and reusable composition improve UX and clarity.
